summary: The diff implements the requested typography/contrast changes by loading and applying the Inter web font globally, increasing text contrast via updated CSS color tokens for light/dark themes, and adding global font rendering enhancements. However, the diff also includes modifications to non-requested meta/state files and may include additional non-typography styling/animation changes beyond the scope (cannot be fully verified due to truncation).
